ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status), TEXT(Status) = "Preparation", OR( NOT(Text_sent_4_months_prior__c), NOT(Text_sent_6_months_prior__c), NOT(Text_sent_8_months_prior__c), NOT(Text_sent_12_months_prior__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Complete all text communication review fields before moving to Preparation.
